subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned toward the Countenance and believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that he may find tranquility through His grace... the first fragrance wafted from the Garment of Glory and the first perfume [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم ان اذکر من اقبل الی الوجه و آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لیطمئن بفضل... اول نفحة فاحت من قمیص الکبریآء و اول عرف
